title: You've Got a Friend
album: Mud Slide Slim And The Blue Horizon
why_this_song: You've Got a Friend by James Taylor (1971) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "All you've got to do is call"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "You just call out my name"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "And you know wherever I am"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I'll come running, oh, yeah, baby"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "You've got a friend"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: You just call out my name
And you know wherever I am
I'll come running, oh, yeah, baby
And I'll be there, yeah, yeah, yeah
Should turn dark and full of clouds

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "you've" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "you've" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "call" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "call" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And I'll be there, yeah, yeah, yeah
All you've got to do is call

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And you need a helping hand
Soon I'll be knocking upon your door
They'll hurt you and desert you

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "You've Got a Friend" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "You've Got a Friend" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "You've Got a Friend" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "You've Got a Friend", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "You've Got a Friend" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "You've Got a Friend" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
